## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Package

Which package is affected?

- [ ] ontology
- [ ] datasets
- [ ] models
- [ ] tools
- [ ] rlhf
- [ ] compliance
- [ ] deploy
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or logs.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 15)
- **Python version**: (e.g., 3.10.12)
- **GPU**: (e.g., NVIDIA A100, Apple M3 Max, None)
- **Deployment tier**: (L1 local / L2 cluster / L3 cloud / development)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.

> **Important**: Do NOT include any real patient data in bug reports. Use synthetic examples only.
